result.title: Go from notes to study guide with Search 📝
result.description:
Get free finals study support with Search. Just press the AI Mode button, upload your notes, and press the blue Canvas button for a custom study guide.

#GoogleSearch #AIMode

result.title: Behind the Doodle: The Art of K-Pop Dance #GoogleDoodle
result.description:
Take a peek behind the AANHPI Heritage Month Doodle and see how K-pop dance crew @SHEROFFICIALS adapted the official @LESSERAFIM_official “Celebration” choreo for the #GoogleDoodle video  🎬💃🕺 

From the dance floor to the animation studio, here’s how we transformed every move into digital magic.

Track and official choreography: “Celebration” by @LESSERAFIM_official

result.title: Level up at I/O
result.description:
Tune in. Level up. Unlock. Join us live here on YouTube May 19 at 10am PT. The stage is set for Google's biggest AI updates. 

The updates are ready‚ are you? 

Watch everything we shared on the stage at I/O 25 here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL590L5WQmH8e6_yWMouOJsLXFQzGBNerh

result.title: The Art of K-Pop Dance #GoogleDoodle
result.description: In celebration of Asian American, Native Hawaiian, and Pacific Islander Heritage Month, this Doodle celebrates the art of K-Pop dance by shining a light on the American K-Pop dance community—where global fandoms connect through local artistry. The Doodle is set to @LESSERAFIM_official's song “Celebration” with choreography interpreted by LA-based K-Pop dance team @SHEROFFICIALS.
